sections.paragraph:
ἀπάρτισμα, ατος, τό s. ἀπαρτίζω (3 Km 7:9 Sym.) completion ἀ. ἀφθαρσίας consummation of immortality IPhld 9:2. Cp. DELG s.v. ἀραρίσκω.

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 98
